name: agentflow-oss
description: Maintainer workflow engine for repeatable AI-assisted coding, review, quality gates, provider routing, sprint state, and carry-over workflows.

scripts.test:offline: pnpm run test:offline:watchers && pnpm run test:offline:core
scripts.test:offline:core: node --import tsx --test tests/poc-middleman.ts tests/poc-contract-gate.ts tests/poc-readiness.ts tests/poc-best-so-far.ts tests/poc-research-recipe.ts tests/poc-release-readiness.ts tests/poc-pr-review.ts tests/poc-security-review.ts tests/poc-conditional-step.ts tests/poc-sprint-index.ts tests/poc-streaming-checkpoint.ts tests/poc-api-design-review.ts tests/poc-parallel-foreach.ts tests/poc-replan.ts tests/poc-consensus-voting.ts tests/poc-webhook.ts tests/poc-management-api.ts
scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm run test:offline && pnpm run test:eval && pnpm run test:secret-scan
